evidenceBoundary.summary: This trace records observable repository work, files read or changed, implementation decisions, validation evidence, pivots and residual risks.

correctiveBranchBehaviour.reason: Earlier branches were created before the repository operating model was loaded correctly.

precedence: GitHub governs branch hygiene, PR discipline, validation evidence and trace capture.
ResearchOps Developer Control governs platform architecture and route-state tests.
Multi-Functional Team governs public-sector service assurance and role input.
GOV.UK Design System governs UI, content, link behaviour and accessibility.
Cloudflare governs Worker routing and runtime behaviour.
Airtable Public API governs record-shape and schema-write safety.

initialFindings: public/js/projects-page.js hard-codes Home Office Biometrics as the project organisation fallback.
/api/projects currently lists projects without receiving scoped authentication context from the Worker route.
The project service maps core project fields but not a canonical team identity.
UserGroups parsing can render malformed person-field or JSON fragments.
public/js/project-dashboard.js loads all projects and searches client-side by ID.
public/pages/start/start-new-project.js posts to /api/projects and must attach active team context server-side.
visual-walkthrough.operational-fixtures.mjs mocks project reads and does not create live records.

plannedCommits.summary: Create trace Markdown and JSON before code changes.
Update project card, dashboard and start-project client behaviour.
Update product documentation and assess RECENT_LEARNINGS.md.

risks.risk: Airtable project team schema is not yet explicit or may differ by environment.
risks.mitigation: Tolerate known field variants for reads; document field assumptions; do not silently invent migrations.

risks.risk: CSV fallback records may not contain team scope.
risks.mitigation: Treat unscoped records as visible only to ResearchOps Core.

risks.risk: Project creation may fail if Airtable lacks configured team fields.
risks.mitigation: Return a clear configuration error and document required field configuration.

risks.risk: Start project gating only on the client would be insufficient.
risks.mitigation: Enforce permission server-side and mirror capability in the UI.

risks.risk: Malformed UserGroups values may contain personal data fragments.
risks.mitigation: Filter identity-like fragments and avoid logging raw values.

rollback.rollbackRoute: Revert branch commits or close the PR unmerged. If deployed and problematic, roll back Worker and Pages deployments to the previous main deployment.

progress.event: Initial plan created before code changes.
